arcs.name: problem_of_practice_fresh
arcs.description: The leader has identified a gap or problem but has not yet explored why it is happening or what to do about it. Takes them from problem clarification through root cause to a concrete plan.
diagnostic_markers: I have a problem I need to figure out
Something is not working and I am not sure why
Students are struggling with
We are seeing a gap in
I have noticed that
I do not know where to start
We keep having this issue

arcs.name: problem_of_practice_have_root_cause
arcs.display_name: Problem of Practice — Root Cause Known
arcs.description: The leader believes they understand why the problem is happening and needs help moving from diagnosis to action.
diagnostic_markers: I know why this is happening
The root cause is
We have figured out that
I understand the problem now
Now I need to figure out what to do
I need help planning

arcs.name: problem_of_practice_implementing
arcs.description: The leader has a plan in motion to rectify a specific problem of practiceand is navigating what is happening as they execute it.
diagnostic_markers: I am in the middle of trying this
We started the plan and
I am implementing and running into
Things are underway but
I have been trying this approach

arcs.name: problem_of_practice_have_results
arcs.description: The leader has implemented something to rectify a specific problem of practice and has results to examine. Needs help interpreting what happened and deciding what comes next.
diagnostic_markers: We tried it and here is what happened
I have results to look at
The data shows
It worked but
It did not work and I need to figure out why
I am not sure what to make of the results

arcs.name: change_initiative
arcs.description: The leader is planning or managing a change effort that involves moving people to a new way of doing something. Combines problem framing, stakeholder strategy, action planning, and implementation.
diagnostic_markers: I need to change how we do
We are rolling out
I need to get people on board
There is resistance to
I am trying to shift the culture
We are moving to a new approach and people are not sure about it
This is a big change and I need to help people understand it

arcs.name: interpersonal_situation
arcs.description: The leader is navigating a difficult relationship or personnel situation. Focuses on understanding the other person's perspective and planning a constructive response.
diagnostic_markers: I am having trouble with a staff member
There is a conflict between
A colleague and I are not seeing eye to eye
I need to have a difficult conversation
Someone on my team is
A relationship is strained
I do not know how to approach this person

arcs.name: assumption_revision
arcs.description: The leader senses that their current approach is not working and that the problem may lie in their underlying beliefs or mental models rather than their tactics. Triggered when Interrogate Results routes back to root cause.
diagnostic_markers: I keep trying things and nothing works
Maybe I have been thinking about this wrong
I am not sure my original assumption was right
The results are telling me something I did not expect
I think I need to rethink my approach fundamentally
What if the problem is not what I thought it was
The results are telling me something I did not expect
